author: chotuchaiwala
content: Wrote up this doc for zk proving setup, would be great if folks could have a look and review it. Planning to add this to panda docs

author: taulepton_
content: do you have a link i can see it?

author: han0110
content:
Just reviewed it (by hackmd.io btw), in the diagram `ere-verifier` not in `zkboost` is a bit confusing initially (but I can see the explanation in the following notes), otherwise this looks really pretty clear to me! The `zkboost` param part also looks correct to me. 

(btw I found [the comment in this example](https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/blob/main/.github/tests/examples/zkboost_in_process_verifier.yaml#L12-L14) can be removed, the latest `zkboost` image should support in-process verifier for all zkVMs, no need to do custom build anymore)

author: chotuchaiwala
content: The idea for separation was to show request flow(esp since there's the verifier-crate now, which can allow to have a separate verifier only node down the line) but if you suggest to have that within zkboost block, that would be fair too

author: chotuchaiwala
content: yes, the comment was made when the zkboost zisk-verifier PR was up, will fix
